full_text: By continuing, you agree to Instagram's Terms of Use and Privacy Policy. Photo by Mount Sinai Health System on November 10, 2025. Mount Sinai Health System has announced the rollout of Microsoft Dragon Copilot, an AI-powered clinical assistant designed to enhance efficiency, reduce burnout, and improve patient experiences across the System. Mount Sinai is the first academic medical center to deploy Dragon Copilot system-wide, marking a major milestone in the institution’s digital transformation and leadership in responsible AI innovation. Read more about Mount Sinai’s approach to artificial intelligence by heading to the link in our bio. Photo by Mount Sinai Health System on June 24, 2026. Photo by Mount Sinai Health System on November 10, 2025.

Mount Sinai Health System has announced the rollout of Microsoft Dragon Copilot, an AI-powered clinical assistant designed to enhance efficiency, reduce burnout, and improve patient experiences across the System.

Mount Sinai is the first academic medical center to deploy Dragon Copilot system-wide, marking a major milestone in the institution’s digital transformation and leadership in responsible AI innovation.
Read more about Mount Sinai’s approach to artificial intelligence by heading to the link in our bio.
